task: Survey the agent harness codebase focusing on the memory and data-flow systems. Read: harness/memory.py, harness/engram_memory.py, harness/engram_memory_parts/ (all files), harness/engram_schema.py, harness/session_store.py, harness/session_index.py, harness/session_artifacts.py, harness/consolidate.py, harness/compaction.py, harness/workspace.py, harness/workspace_parts/ (all files), harness/optimize/ (all files), harness/cmd_decay.py, harness/cmd_consolidate.py, harness/cmd_optimize.py. Also check harness/schema.sql. Return: what each module does, data flow between them, notable design patterns, and any concerns you spot (duplication, fragility, missing features, scaling issues).
